name: SCROTAL ABSCESS
dominant_finding: hypointense on T1WI + hyperintense on T2WI ← fluid content
distribution: central hyperintensity on DWI with corresponding low signal on ADC map ← restricted
discriminating_features: hypointense on T1WI + hyperintense on T2WI ← fluid content
nonenhancing lesion + avid enhancement of surrounding tissue
central hyperintensity on DWI with corresponding low signal on ADC map ← restricted
hypoechoic / complex fluid collection (differentiation of intra- from extratesticular abscess

NUC: marked increase in perfusion = hot hemiscrotum with photon-deficient area representing the
increased scrotal uptake with leukocyte imaging
US: hypoechoic / complex fluid collection (differentiation of intra- from extratesticular abscess
intratesticular abscess with low-level internal echoes + shaggy wall
focal area of absent color Doppler flow
MR: hypointense on T1WI + hyperintense on T2WI ← fluid content
nonenhancing lesion + avid enhancement of surrounding tissue
central hyperintensity on DWI with corresponding low signal on ADC map ← restricted
